flags.message: The snapshot for this case contains no docket entries, no filing/termination dates, and no party or counsel detail beyond the caption. The prediction rests almost entirely on the docket-number format (03M77, the OT2003 SCOTUS miscellaneous-motions docket) and the prisoner-v-warden caption, plus corpus base rates. A snapshot with docket entries would let a predictor distinguish the motion type (out-of-time filing vs. extraordinary-writ leave) and detect signals like a call for a response.
